long_description:
MHC captured VIP IP is down across all regions.  We verified manually in SYD AZ2 161.26.53.11  ip is not received in gobgp. Please open a team bridge and involve respective teams.
VIP IP: 161.26.53.11
Service Endpoint: 
s3.direct.mil01.cloud-object-storage.appdomain.cloud
Incident source: https://ibm-cloudplatform.slack.com/archives/C07L85XDY94/p1764920549249369 - Saravanan Velayutham
short_description: vip ip down for service cos across all region
close_notes:
<!-- do-not-process -->
(All Timestamps must be in UTC)
Issue Summary: vip ip down for service cos across all region
SME Findings: 
Reason of Escalation: 
Resolution Steps: Milan DC was taken offline on the 5th December and the stale enpoints are throwing errors
Signature of Issue :unable to reach endpoint
Jira/Github/Other Tickets: 
Category/Subcategory: is-vpc 	Service 	CIS
Timeline Summary: Milan DC was taken offline on the 5th December and the stale enpoints are throwing errors
Resolution Runbook: Not Needed
Caused by Change/Incident: 
Warroom: 
Meeting URL: 
Outage Start: 
Outage End :

CORE SRE paged COS team (Pranav Prakash & Aiswarya Mohanasundaram ) joined the call
CORE SRE did collect info. for one of the edge node syd1-qz1-sr3-rk082-s44 in mzone2h7
Aiswarya Mohanasundaram check internal with the team and informed that this was conveyed to the customer about the sunset of service endpoint.", "added_by": "krunal.patel2@ibm.com", "added_on": "2025-12-05T08:39:48Z"}]
